response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, experienced engineer with genuine developer-tooling interest — including direct IDE work on NI LabWindows/CVI and authoring test frameworks and language libraries — but the core required stack is largely absent. Java appears only peripherally, there is no Kotlin, no Spring or enterprise JVM framework experience, and no demonstrated deep JVM expertise. His depth lies in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang rather than the enterprise Java ecosystem this role is built around.
strengths: Prior IDE development experience (C/C++ components for NI LabWindows/CVI)
Strong developer-tooling track record: test runners, assertion libraries, MCP code generators
Proven ability on complex, high-scale systems (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
concerns: No Kotlin experience and only minor, dated Java exposure
No Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus, or enterprise JVM framework background
Deep JVM internals knowledge required by the role is not evidenced
